summary: Backend API testing complete for new AI Village features - Combat System, Guild Management, and AI Helper. All 31 tests passed.
passed_tests: GET /api/combat/stats - returns combat actions (attack, block, dodge, sprint), armor types, weapon types, base stats
GET /api/character/{id}/combat-stats - returns character stats with sprint drain calculation
POST /api/character/{id}/action (attack) - deals damage, costs stamina, calculates criticals
POST /api/character/{id}/action (block) - enables blocking state with 70% damage reduction
POST /api/character/{id}/action (dodge) - uses stamina, provides invulnerability frames
POST /api/character/{id}/action (sprint) - calculates drain using formula with strength/endurance/armor_weight
POST /api/character/{id}/move (sprint) - moves faster with stamina drain
POST /api/character/{id}/move - supports all 8 directions (up, down, left, right, diagonals)
POST /api/character/{id}/equip (armor) - equips chainmail with weight update
Sprint formula - heavy armor (plate) increases drain vs light armor (cloth)
POST /api/guilds - creates guild with type bonuses (combat guild has 1.15 damage)
POST /api/guilds/{id}/join - user joins guild as initiate
GET /api/ai-helper/status (regular user) - returns enabled=false, not authorized
GET /api/ai-helper/capabilities (sirix_1 mobile) - returns full capabilities list
GET /api/guild-types - returns all 5 types with correct bonuses
critical_code_review_comments: Combat system properly implements stamina formula: drain = 0.5 + (armor_weight * 0.5) / ((strength/endurance) * 0.75)
Sprint stamina drain correctly increases with heavier armor (plate > chain > leather > cloth > none)
Block action provides 70% damage reduction as specified
Guild types correctly return bonuses: trade(gold_gain:1.2), combat(damage:1.15), crafting(craft_speed:1.25), exploration(travel_speed:1.3), mystical(essence_gain:1.25)
AI Helper properly restricts to Sirix-1 only - returns 403 for regular users
AI Helper capabilities include: vibration, notification, battery, network, orientation, wake_lock, clipboard
seed_data_creation: Tests create temporary users, characters, and guilds with TEST_ prefix pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new combat/guild/AI helper features tested and working. Combat actions: attack(10 stamina, 15 base damage), heavy_attack(25 stamina, 35 damage), block(5 stamina/sec, 70% reduction), dodge(15 stamina, 0.5s invuln), sprint(formula-based drain, 2x speed). Equipment: 6 armor types (none to legendary), 7 weapon types. Guilds: 5 types with unique bonuses. AI Helper: 8 device capabilities, Sirix-1 only test feature.
